context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the apply-phoenix-controller-conventions instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when writing new Phoenix controller modules or modifying existing controller code to ensure consistent, idiomatic patterns.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `before_action` for authentication and resource loading** — chain with `:skip` opt-out pattern

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Always validate and authorize** every action that touches access-controlled resources

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `FallbackController` for JSON API error handling** — never inline `error/2` or catch-all `case` clauses in actions

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `conn.assigns` for passing data between plugs and actions** — never use `Process` dictionaries

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never interpolate user input into redirect paths** — use `~p"..."` paths for verified routes

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Checkpoint:** Run `mix phx.routes` to verify routes resolve correctly.
